questions.question: In a v-for loop over a reactive Map, how does each entry destructure?
options: As a single value — Map keys are not exposed in v-for
As [key, value] — Vue iterates Map entries the same way as arrays
As { key, value } — Vue uses object destructuring for Maps
As an index-value pair identical to array iteration

questions.question: Which approach is better when you need to replace an entire reactive Map with fresh data from an API?
options: reactive(new Map()) — call .clear() then re-add all entries
ref(new Map()) — replace scores.value with a new Map instance
Both are identical in performance and syntax
Use a plain object instead; Maps can't be replaced wholesale

questions.question: How do you watch a specific key in a reactive Map without watching the entire collection?
